old_eye.title: Craft the Old Eye (center: Sol Visage + death worm chitin + essence + sandstorm + relic gold + ancient pearl)

place_old.title: Place the Old Eye in the End Portal frame

subtitle.text: The Oldest Civilization remembered everything. It was not enough. You carry their record now.

description: The Old Eye is in the frame.
Ten eyes placed (if all previous eyes collected).
The Oldest Civilization fell because remembering everything
did not protect them from the same mistakes.
The Old Eye does not feel the world. It remembers it.
This distinction — between memory and feeling —
is the one the previous cycle failed to understand.
The Cursed Eye is their monument to that failure.
You have now inherited their memory.
The question is whether you will carry it differently.
